creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
hrs         2008-11-16 09:52:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    japanese/ptex        Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    japanese/ptex/files  patch-texk::web2c::ptex-ver::Makefile.in 
  Log:
  Update to 3.1.10.  Changes include:
  
   plfonts.dtx:
          - Fixed issue of $a^\mathrm{b}, a_\mathrm{b}$.
          - Support \reDeclareMathAlphabet as a rubust sequence.
  
   tascmac.sty:
          - Several issues of itembox and screen environment fixed.
  
   ptex:
          - Fix uninitialized variable issue.
  
   [pt]lto[tp]f:
          - Fix handling of section 16 in kanji map.
  
  PR:     ports/128828
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.35      +41 -43    ports/japanese/ptex/Makefile
  1.12      +6 -6      ports/japanese/ptex/distinfo
  1.2       +2 -2      ports/japanese/ptex/files/patch-texk::web2c::ptex-ver::Makefile.in
  1.8       +20 -74    ports/japanese/ptex/pkg-plist
